subject: [SDC] Update SDC docker versions to 1.10.0
commit_message:

Update SDC docker versions to 1.10.0

Signed-off-by: MichaelMorris <michael.morris@est.tech>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4499/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4499/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4499/ )

Patch Set 5:

Are the failures seen here due to instability in the tests? basic_vm and basic_vm_macro failed in #5 bur succeeded in #3, while basic_cnf failed in #3 but succeeded in #5
The errors for basic_vm ("Locked instance - This vfModule (0e525248-596f-43eb-a215-4dc1448a8922) already has a request being worked with a status of IN_PROGRESS" during service deletion) and basic_vm_macro (No valid host was found) dont look to be related to SDC.
There was no change in contents from #3 to #5
